method: Computed paleo L1 integers for major Laskar beats at geological epochs from 0 to 620 Ma. Used paleo-LOD data to compute paleo-k, then paleo-H = 13 × paleo-precession-period, then paleo n = 8H_paleo / paleo-beat-period. Validated against published Mesozoic and Paleozoic cyclostratigraphic obliquity/precession estimates.
